issues.description: Card has two distinct effects but effects array is empty. Must include: (1) conditional attack restriction when hand size ≥5, and (2) Blocker keyword.
Missing effect for hand size restriction: 'If you have 5 or more cards in your hand, this Character cannot attack' requires condition on HasCardOnBoard/hand size check with action preventing attack.
Missing Blocker keyword effect. Blocker is a triggered ability: OnAttacked trigger that allows resting this card to redirect incoming attack.

suggestedDsl.effectText: If you have 5 or more cards in your hand, this Character cannot attack. [Blocker]
